overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character wading through a mountain stream toward a large waterfall in a forested canyon. The scene features natural rock formations, pine trees, and a temporary campsite visible early in the clip, with the character eventually reaching the waterfall base and looking up at the cascade.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow forest stream with campsite on rocky shore

agents.ego_description: wading through waist-deep water toward the waterfall, moving steadily forward

entered.detail: white canvas tarp shelter set up on rocky shore with camping gear visible underneath
large waterfall cascading down rocky cliff face with mist at base
steep granite rock wall with scattered pine trees
tall evergreen trees surrounding the canyon
tall evergreen trees surrounding the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character wades through a clear mountain stream toward a distant waterfall. A canvas campsite with a white tarp is visible on the left rocky shore, while pine trees and steep cliffs frame the canyon on both sides.

events.description: campsite with canvas tarp passes out of view to the left, leaving only natural rock and water ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing to wade through deeper water toward the waterfall base, navigating around submerged rocks

entered.detail: rocks visible beneath the water surface in the stream

segments.scene_description: With the campsite now behind, the character continues through the stream as the waterfall grows larger in the frame. Submerged rocks become visible in the water, and the rocky cliffs on both sides appear closer as the canyon narrows toward the falls.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall base with heavy mist and spray

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at the full height of the waterfall
increasing mist and spray from waterfall creates more diffused lighting conditions

agents.ego_description: reaching the base of the waterfall and looking up at the cascading water falling from above

entered.detail: the top edge of the cliff with sky visible above the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the base of the waterfall where mist and spray fill the air. The camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the cascade, showing the cliff top edge against the sky while the side cliffs recede to the edges of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow mountain canyon that culminates at the base of a towering waterfall. It begins with the character wading through a clear stream, passing a canvas campsite with a white tarp on the rocky shore as pine trees and steep cliffs frame the path. As the character advances, the campsite recedes and the canyon walls draw closer, revealing submerged rocks beneath the water's surface while the waterfall grows larger in the frame. The scene then shifts into a haze of mist and spray as the character reaches the water's edge, before the camera finally tilts upward to reveal the full height of the cascade against the sky.
